canvas.pickFromPalette: Pick a color from the palette on the left

steps.label: 2. Color it:
steps.text: Tap an area on the picture

steps.title: 🎯 Letter Sequence Game
steps.content: Hi there! Today we'll learn to find the next letter in a sequence!

steps.title: 📝 How to Play
steps.content: You'll see 3 letters in order — find the letter that comes next!

steps.title: 🌟 Another Example
steps.content: If you see G H I, the next letter is J!

steps.title: 🎮 Ready to Play!
steps.content: You've got it! Let's start and find the next letters!

steps.title: 🔢 Counting Game
steps.content: You'll see a group of items. Count how many there are!

steps.title: 👆 How to Play
steps.content: Count the items on screen, then tap the matching number below.

steps.title: 🎯 Example
steps.content: If you see 3 apples, tap the number 3.

steps.title: 🎮 Ready!
steps.content: Count carefully and pick the right number!

steps.title: 🔤 Starting Letter Game
steps.content: You'll see a picture and a word. Pick the letter the word starts with!

steps.title: 👀 How to Play
steps.content: Look at the word under the picture. The first letter is the answer.

steps.title: 🍎 Example
steps.content: If you see 🍎 Apple, the first letter is A.

steps.title: 🎮 Let's Go!
steps.content: Pick the starting letter of the word!

steps.title: 🎨 Color Guessing Game
steps.content: You'll see a colored circle and a hint emoji. Pick the color name!

steps.title: 👀 How to Play
steps.content: Look at the colored circle, then pick the right name below.

steps.title: 🍎 Example
steps.content: Red circle with 🍎 → answer is Red.

steps.title: 🎮 Let's Go!
steps.content: Time to identify some colors!

steps.title: 🧩 Color Matching
steps.content: Each color appears twice. Find the matching pairs!

steps.title: 👆 How to Play
steps.content: Flip one card, then flip the next. Matching pairs stay open.

steps.title: 🧠 Tip
steps.content: Remember which cards you've seen to match faster!

steps.title: 🎮 Ready!
steps.content: Try to match all pairs with as few tries as possible!

steps.title: 🎨 Creative Coloring
steps.content: Pick your favorite color and fill in the picture!

steps.title: 👆 How to Color
steps.content: Step 1: pick a color from the palette. Step 2: tap an area to color it.

steps.title: 🧽 Erase & Switch
steps.content: Tap the eraser to remove a color from an area. Change colors anytime!

steps.title: 📥 Finish
steps.content: When you're done, download your masterpiece to share!

steps.title: 🔷 Shapes Game
steps.content: You'll see a shape. Pick the right name for it!

steps.title: 👀 How to Play
steps.content: Look at the shape and choose the matching name below.

steps.title: 🎮 Let's Go!
steps.content: Time to learn the basic shapes!

steps.title: 📚 Mixed Review
steps.content: Review numbers, letters, colors and shapes — all in one game!

steps.title: 👆 How to Play
steps.content: Each round shows a card. Pick the correct answer from the choices.

steps.title: 🎮 Let's Go!
steps.content: Let's see what you remember!
